name: Classic Milk Tea
description: Traditional black tea with rich creamy milk. A timeless favorite with a smooth, comforting taste.

name: Jasmine Green Tea
description: Delicate jasmine-infused green tea with a floral aroma. Light, refreshing, and perfect for a calm moment.

name: Oolong Tea
description: Premium oolong tea with a smooth, slightly sweet taste. A perfect balance of flavor and aroma.

name: Taro Milk Tea
description: Creamy taro flavor blended with smooth milk tea. Nutty and sweet with a beautiful purple hue.

name: Strawberry Milk Tea
description: Fresh strawberry flavor combined with creamy milk tea. Sweet, fruity, and refreshing.

name: Matcha Milk Tea
description: Premium matcha powder blended with silky milk. Earthy, slightly sweet, and energizing.

name: Lemon Tea
description: Refreshing citrus flavor with a tangy, bright taste. Perfect for a hot day.

name: Mango Passion Fruit Tea
description: Tropical blend of mango and passion fruit. Exotic, fruity, and incredibly refreshing.

name: Peach Oolong Tea
description: Sweet peach flavor infused with premium oolong tea. A delicate, fruity combination.

name: Dragon Fruit Smoothie
description: Vibrant dragon fruit blended with creamy milk and tea. Smooth, sweet, and visually stunning.

name: Honey Milk Tea with Pudding
description: Smooth milk tea sweetened with honey and topped with creamy pudding. A comfort drink with rich layers.

name: Premium Taiwan Milk Tea
description: Authentic Taiwan-style milk tea with premium ingredients. Bold, smooth, and unforgettable.

name: Salted Caramel Latte
description: Rich caramel with a hint of salt paired with creamy milk. Sweet, salty, and absolutely delicious.

name: Black Sesame Milk Tea
description: Nutty black sesame flavor in creamy milk tea. Unique, aromatic, and deeply satisfying.

name: Mango Lassi Tea
description: South Asian-inspired blend of mango, yogurt, and tea. Creamy, tropical, and exotic.
